items.title: Pakistan declares "open war" with Afghanistan as airstrikes rock Kabul
items.description: Pakistan bombed major Afghan cities and declared "open war" after Afghanistan's Taliban rulers claimed an unprecedented aerial attack on Islamabad.

items.title: How Americans plan to use their bigger tax refunds this year
items.description: Early tax refund data shows the typical check is so far 14% higher than a year ago. Here's what Americans are planning to do with the money.

items.title: JFK stowaway arrested after allegedly sneaking onto another flight, sources say
items.description: A woman convicted of stowing away on a flight out of JFK Airport in 2024 has allegedly done it again, this time at Newark Airport, sources say.

items.title: U.S. clears some diplomatic staff to leave Israel amid tension with Iran
items.description: As Trump leaves the threat of war on the table amid nuclear talks with Iran, the State Department urges Americans to "consider leaving Israel" while t...

items.title: U.S. offers $10 million for capture of cartel bosses "The Frog" and "Achilles"
items.description: The U. S. is offering $5 million each for information on Rene Arzate Garcia and his brother Alfonso Arzate Garcia.
